title: source
description: The authored (or refined) mockup-video source: a tour (HTML pages + manifest) or a slidey deck.

paths.description: Authored source files (HTML pages for tour; the deck JSON for slidey).

spec_path.description: The render entrypoint: the tour manifest path (tour) or the deck JSON path (slidey).

summary.description: One-line human summary of what was authored/edited.

edited.description: Refine pass only: the source_ref targets edited this pass.
